BONKAI

SOMETHING TASTY IS COMING TO THE BLOCKCHAIN

We've taken the three most hyped coins in the crypto world - bonk and AI - and fused them together to create bonkai! We're all about the hype and know how to make some noise. By bringing together these big-time tokens, we're cooking up something truly unique for all you investors and enthusiasts out there. Get ready to have your mind blown by bonkai, the ultimate crypto fusion!

bonk Ai Chatbot

  • 24/7 availability on the website and integrated social media platforms.
  • Capabilities to engage in witty banter, provide project information, and offer market insights.
  • Learning mechanism to adapt responses based on user interactions.

Meme Generation Tool

  • Templates of "bonk" memes for users to customize.
  • AI suggestions for meme text based on current trends and user input.

ROADMAP

Phase 1

-Presale
-Launch
-Coingecko/Coinmarketcap Listings
-Trending on AveDex
-Dexscreener & other data aggregators
-Listing on Major Exchanges

Phase 2

-BONKAI on the News
-Community Growth
-Huge Marketing Push
-Ambassadors Application

Phase 3

-Ambassadors Announcement
-100,000+ holders
-Meme Takeover

DISTRIBUTION

Total Supply: 1000000
Name: BONKAI
Symbol: $BONKAI
Chain: SOLANA
